title: Jam Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Jam with a Z-Score of +5.14. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Jam has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10, causing significant discomfort to the residents. 
 The low humidity of 14% and moderate wind speed of 12.9 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The high CDD of 17.0 GG indicates a substantial energy demand for cooling, while the HDD remains at 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
